hooks.command: D="/Users/home/Documents/agent-ecosystem/Insights"; F=$(ls -t "$D"/*.html 2>/dev/null | head -1); if [ -z "$F" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"It has been a while since you last ran /insight - want to check in on your usage patterns?\"}"; else M=$(stat -f%m "$F" 2>/dev/null || stat -c%Y "$F" 2>/dev/null); A=$(( ($(date +%s) - M) / 86400 )); if [ "$A" -gt 7 ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\": \"It has been a while since you last ran /insight - want to check in on your usage patterns?\"}"; fi; fi
